title: pyrus tenuis
intro: Pyrus tenuis, also known as the Chinese wild pear, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Pyrus tenuis is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating coughs, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine formulas.
